selection_rule: Minimize unconstrained March log loss; deploy stacker with temperature floor T>=1 (no sharpening).

calibration.note: blend fitted by penalized maximum likelihood (logistic stacking); equivalent to (w, T, s) via w=a/(a+b), T=1/(a+b), s=c. If the unconstrained fit had T < temperature_floor, coefficients were projected to T = temperature_floor (no sharpening) and the intercept was refit.

notes: Base model coefficients use games through February.
March state features update only after each completed game date.
No April row is loaded by model selection.
March is the stacker training set AND the architecture-selection set. Reported March metrics are therefore in-sample for the blend and must not be treated as a pristine holdout score.
Unconstrained logistic stacking can learn T=1/(a+b)<1 and over-sharpen prices; deploy coefficients enforce T>=1 (convex logit blend weight with temperature floor).
Primary April deliverable is frozen pre-April state with the through-February base-model generator (calibrator contract match).
